ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alexch33/super-video-downloader
Language: kotlin
Video & Audio downloader for Android with web browser and player. M3U8 and MPD supported, live stream supported, using youtube-dlp and custom mp4/mp3/m3u8/mpd downloader, cookies supported, HTTP & SOCKS proxy chains supported, encrypted DNS

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Jakedismo/codegraph-rust
Language: rust
100% Rust implementation of code graphRAG with blazing fast AST+FastML parsing, surrealDB backend and advanced agentic code analysis tools through MCP for efficient code agent context management
